info.title: ENSApi APIs
info.description: APIs for ENS resolution, navigating the ENS nameforest, and metadata about an ENSNode

tags.name: Resolution
tags.description: APIs for resolving ENS names and addresses

tags.name: Meta
tags.description: APIs for indexing status, configuration, and realtime monitoring

tags.name: Explore
tags.description: APIs for exploring the indexed state of ENS, including name tokens and registrar actions

tags.name: ENSAwards
tags.description: APIs for ENSAwards functionality, including referrer data

get.description: Returns the indexing status snapshot most recently captured from ENSIndexer

postgresql.description: Version of the PostgreSQL server hosting the ENSDb instance.

get.description: Checks if the indexing progress is guaranteed to be within a requested worst-case distance of realtime

schema.description: Maximum acceptable worst-case indexing distance in seconds

parameters.description: Maximum acceptable worst-case indexing distance in seconds
parameters.name: maxWorstCaseDistance

200.description: Indexing progress is guaranteed to be within the requested distance of realtime

503.description: Indexing progress is not guaranteed to be within the requested distance of realtime or indexing status unavailable

get.description: Resolves ENS records for a given name

schema.description: ENS name to resolve (e.g. 'vitalik.eth'). Must be normalized per ENSIP-15.

parameters.description: ENS name to resolve (e.g. 'vitalik.eth'). Must be normalized per ENSIP-15.
parameters.name: name

schema.description: Include detailed OpenTelemetry trace information about the resolution in the response.

parameters.description: Include detailed OpenTelemetry trace information about the resolution in the response.
parameters.name: trace

schema.description: Attempt Protocol Acceleration using indexed data.

parameters.description: Attempt Protocol Acceleration using indexed data.
parameters.name: accelerate

get.description: Resolves a primary name for a given `address` and `chainId`

schema.description: EVM wallet address (e.g. '0xd8da6bf26964af9d7eed9e03e53415d37aa96045').

parameters.description: EVM wallet address (e.g. '0xd8da6bf26964af9d7eed9e03e53415d37aa96045').
parameters.name: address

schema.description: Chain ID as a string (e.g. '1' for Ethereum mainnet). Use '0' for the default EVM chain.

parameters.description: Chain ID as a string (e.g. '1' for Ethereum mainnet). Use '0' for the default EVM chain.
parameters.name: chainId

schema.description: Include detailed OpenTelemetry trace information about the resolution in the response.

parameters.description: Include detailed OpenTelemetry trace information about the resolution in the response.
parameters.name: trace

schema.description: Attempt Protocol Acceleration using indexed data.

parameters.description: Attempt Protocol Acceleration using indexed data.
parameters.name: accelerate

errors: EVM address must be a valid EVM address

get.description: Resolves all primary names for a given address across multiple chains

schema.description: EVM wallet address (e.g. '0xd8da6bf26964af9d7eed9e03e53415d37aa96045').

parameters.description: EVM wallet address (e.g. '0xd8da6bf26964af9d7eed9e03e53415d37aa96045').
parameters.name: address

schema.description: Comma-separated list of chain IDs to resolve primary names for (e.g. '1,10,8453').

parameters.description: Comma-separated list of chain IDs to resolve primary names for (e.g. '1,10,8453').
parameters.name: chainIds

schema.description: Include detailed OpenTelemetry trace information about the resolution in the response.

parameters.description: Include detailed OpenTelemetry trace information about the resolution in the response.
parameters.name: trace

schema.description: Attempt Protocol Acceleration using indexed data.

parameters.description: Attempt Protocol Acceleration using indexed data.
parameters.name: accelerate

errors: EVM address must be a valid EVM address

get.description: Returns name tokens for the requested identifier (domainId or name)

schema.description: Domain node hash identifier

parameters.description: Domain node hash identifier
parameters.name: domainId

schema.description: ENS name to look up tokens for

parameters.description: ENS name to look up tokens for
parameters.name: name

error.details: This ENSNode instance has not been configured to index tokens for the requested name: 'vitalik.eth'

503.description: Service unavailable - Name Tokens API prerequisites not met (indexing status not ready or required plugins not activated)

error.message: Name Tokens API is not available
error.details: Connected ENSIndexer must have all following plugins active: registrars, tokenscope

get.description: Returns a paginated page from the referrer leaderboard for a specific edition

schema.description: Page number for pagination

parameters.description: Page number for pagination
parameters.name: page

schema.description: Number of referrers per page

parameters.description: Number of referrers per page
parameters.name: recordsPerPage

get.description: Returns detailed information for a specific referrer for the requested editions. Requires 1-20 distinct edition slugs. All requested editions must be recognized and have cached data, or the request fails.

schema.description: Referrer Ethereum address

parameters.description: Referrer Ethereum address
parameters.name: referrer

schema.description: Comma-separated list of edition slugs

parameters.description: Comma-separated list of edition slugs
parameters.name: editions

200.description: Successfully retrieved referrer detail for requested editions

get.description: Returns a summary for each configured referral program edition, including its current status and award-model-specific runtime data. Editions are sorted in descending order by start timestamp (most recent first).
